channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-19T14:42Z — 1244 outages, 47,726 customers, 710 fair-weather, 15 DC-proximate
item.description: PA-PPL: 2493 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | BGE: 1809 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | BGE: 1141 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | NJ-ACE: 1093 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER)
